title: ItemRadial
description: Quick item switching - Press the shortcut key to open the menu, select the item with the mouse, and release the shortcut key to equip it on your hand
body:
Item Radial is an innovative Minecraft assistant mod that provides players with a visually appealing and practical radial menu system to quickly access their item bar. The main features include:

1. Intuitive radial menu design - Use the R key (default) to call up a circular shortcut menu
2. Three visual themes to choose from:
-Dazzling style (default): Color grouping, hover highlighting effect
-Original style: Simple gray tone design
-Minimalist style: Translucent black background, minimizing interference
3. Item Preview - Hovering items will be enlarged and displayed in the center position
4. Quick item switching - Press the shortcut key to open the menu, select the item with the mouse, and release the shortcut key to equip it on your hand

This module is particularly suitable for quickly switching tools and items in survival mode, or for quickly selecting building materials during construction. All visual elements can be switched in real-time through theme buttons to meet the aesthetic preferences of different players.
